quality-issues.Description: Missing patient phone numbers in demographic records
Duplicate MRN entries found across merged facilities
Invalid date format in lab result timestamps
Stale insurance information for 180+ day inactive patients
Inconsistent department codes between EHR and billing
quality-issues.Root Cause: Root cause identified and corrected through process improvement
quality-issues.Resolution: Data cleansing script executed and validation rule added

quality-issues.Description: Orphaned appointment records with no linked patient
Missing diagnosis codes on emergency department visits
quality-issues.Root Cause: Root cause identified and corrected through process improvement
quality-issues.Resolution: Data cleansing script executed and validation rule added

quality-issues.Description: Duplicate vendor records from system migration
quality-issues.Root Cause: Root cause identified and corrected through process improvement
quality-issues.Resolution: Data cleansing script executed and validation rule added

quality-issues.Description: Invalid ZIP codes in patient address records
Stale provider credentialing data past renewal date
Inconsistent medication names across formulary systems
Orphaned lab orders with no corresponding results
quality-issues.Root Cause: Root cause identified and corrected through process improvement
quality-issues.Resolution: Data cleansing script executed and validation rule added

quality-issues.Description: Missing consent documentation for research subjects
